---
title: "First Break AI for Teams"
subtitle: "Upskill your engineering team on inference, training, and AI product building."
description: "First Break AI for Teams — instructor-led AI upskilling with team dashboards, custom projects, enterprise billing, and completion certificates. Based on the same hands-on curriculum used by the free open cohort."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
css:
  - styles/home.css
  - styles/pricing.css
---

::: {.content-section}

::: {.cta-banner}
### Your team doesn't have an AI skills gap. They have a build gap.

They've watched the lectures. They've read the papers. But nobody on your team has trained a model from scratch, debugged a KV cache, or shipped an AI product end-to-end. That's the gap that costs you — in hiring, in velocity, in decisions made by people who've never touched the metal.
:::

## Close the gap by building, not watching

First Break AI for Teams is the instructor-led version of the [free open cohort](index.qmd). Your team follows the same hands-on roadmap — inference in pure C, model training, AI product deployment — with dedicated support, private channels, and enterprise logistics.

The free cohort stays free. Teams get accountability, access, and billing that works for organizations. Bring your own infrastructure — your team trains on the cloud accounts they already use at work.

---

:::: {.comparison-table}
## Free vs Teams

::: {.comparison-row .comparison-header}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
**Free Cohort**
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
**Teams**
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Curriculum
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Full roadmap, all lessons, all exercises
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Same — nothing is gated
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Pace
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Self-directed
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Instructor-led schedule with milestones
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Support
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Community Discord, public office hours
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Private Discord or Teams channel + priority Q&A
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Office hours
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Weekly, shared with all participants
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Dedicated session for your team
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Progress tracking
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Self-managed
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Team dashboard — see who's on track
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Projects
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Open-ended
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Custom project scoping tied to your stack
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Infrastructure
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Use cohort-provided resources
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Bring Your Own Infra — train within your own cloud
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Certificate
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
No
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
Completion certificate per participant
:::
:::

::: {.comparison-row}
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-label}
Billing
:::
::: {.comparison-cell}
Free
:::
::: {.comparison-cell .comparison-highlight}
PO / invoice / SOW — whatever your finance team needs
:::
:::

::::

---

## Pricing

:::: {.pricing-grid}

::: {.pricing-card}
### Individual

::: {.pricing-amount}
$1,999
:::

::: {.pricing-period}
per person
:::

For individual engineers who want structured support on top of the free curriculum.

- Full curriculum access (same as free)
- Completion certificate (signed, verifiable)
- Priority support via Discord DM
- 1x 1:1 session with the cohort lead (30 min)
- Access to recorded office hours archive
:::

::: {.pricing-card .pricing-card-featured}
### Team

::: {.pricing-amount}
$999
:::

::: {.pricing-period}
per seat · 5–20 seats
:::

For engineering teams upskilling together.

- Everything in Individual
- Private Discord or Teams channel with direct cohort lead access
- Team progress dashboard
- Custom exercises tied to your tech stack and use cases
- Dedicated weekly office hours slot for your team
- Onboarding call with team lead
- **Bring Your Own Infra** — training on your own cloud accounts
:::

::: {.pricing-card}
### Enterprise

::: {.pricing-amount}
Custom
:::

::: {.pricing-period}
20+ seats
:::

For organizations with specific requirements.

- Everything in Team
- Statement of Work (SOW) and custom contract
- Dedicated onboarding and kickoff session
- Joint roadmap planning — align content with your team's goals
- Post-cohort report with completion metrics and outcomes
- **Bring Your Own Infra** — full support for training within your infrastructure
- Option to add GPU compute credits (via our sponsor partners)
:::

::::

---

## What your team walks away with

This is not a passive course. Every participant builds a real portfolio:

- **A technical blog** documenting what they learned — hosted, public, employer-visible
- **Hands-on inference experience** — running and understanding models at the C level
- **A trained model** — fine-tuned or trained from scratch during Step 4
- **A deployed AI product** — shipped and live during Step 5
- **Optionally, a merged open-source contribution** — Step 6 capstone

In 2026, this portfolio is a stronger signal than any certificate. But you get the certificate too.

---

::: {.cta-banner}
### Ready to upskill your team?

Tell us about your team size, timeline, and goals. We'll put together a plan that fits.

[Request a quote](mailto:contact@bubblspace.com?subject=First%20Break%20AI%20for%20Teams%20—%20Quote%20Request){.cta-button}
:::

---

## Frequently asked

**Can we start mid-cohort?**
Yes. The curriculum is modular. We'll scope a start point based on your team's existing skill level.

**What does Bring Your Own Infra mean?**
For Team and Enterprise tiers, your participants can run the training exercises (Step 4) on your organization's own cloud accounts — AWS, GCP, Azure, or any provider. We provide the curriculum and support; you provide the compute environment your team already uses at work.

**What if someone on our team falls behind?**
The team dashboard shows progress per person. The private channel gives your team a safe space to ask questions without the public Discord. The instructor-led pacing keeps everyone moving, but async catch-up is always available.

**Can we customize the curriculum for our stack?**
At the Team and Enterprise tiers, yes. We'll scope custom exercises around your tools, models, and deployment targets. The core roadmap stays the same — the customization is in the applied exercises and project.

**Do you offer refunds?**
Individual is refundable within 14 days if no certificate has been issued. Team and Enterprise terms are covered in the SOW.

---

## Contact

**Email:** [contact@bubblspace.com](mailto:contact@bubblspace.com?subject=First%20Break%20AI%20for%20Teams)

**Cohort lead:** [FireHacker](https://thefirehacker.github.io/) · [GitHub](https://github.com/thefirehacker) · [X](https://x.com/thefirehacker) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/thefirehacker/)

[← Home](index.qmd) · [Roadmap](roadmap.qmd) · [Lessons](lessons/index.qmd) · [Sponsors](sponsors.qmd)

:::
